summary:
This course, "Foundations of Optimization," will cover three main topics: Network Optimization, Linear Programming, and Dynamic Programming. Students will learn modeling skills, how to design and analyze algorithms, and distinguish between different types of algorithms. They will also develop the ability to model real-world problems as optimization problems and work on assignments using the Python programming language. The course will have assignments, a midterm, and a final exam.

Which topic would you like to tackle first?
